title: Merciless (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Merciless}}
'''''Merciless''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] set a trap for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces by hiding [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] among thirteen seemingly abandoned [[Class-A cargo container|containers]] and positioning the ''Merciless'' nearby to wait for a Rebel recovery operation.

When a Rebel deep space probe detected the containers the Alliance dispatched a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] to investigate further. Either due to poor preparation or training, the Imperial forces sprung their trap on the R-22 rather than waiting for a full recovery operation. However, the R-22 pilot was able to destroy the waiting TIEs and scan the containers before the ''Merciless'' arrived. Shortly after the ''Merciless'' began launching fighters of its own, the R-22 fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

The Alliance later recreated the mission as a simulation for training new pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
